name: Ojas Shukla
headline: Wrote the thesis. Built across the stack. Trading it. | sybilian.com

companies.name: Sybilian
companies.description: 100,000-word published framework explaining why the economy is reorganizing around AI. 13 chapters at sybilian.com. Converting into a hedge fund.
key_concepts: Economy as a graph with nodes, edges, and power function P(n) = C(n) x sum[B(n,i) x P(i)]
The Hidden Constant: symmetric intelligence across nodes for 10,000 years, now breaking
Three Changes: Hyperliquidity, Information Compression, Zero Activation Energy
Bottleneck Investing: identify where AI cycle is starved, go long, exit when market prices it in
Lossy Projection Frame: assets as lossy projections of reality onto tradeable coordinates

companies.name: Gerra
companies.description: One of the largest commercial humanoid robot fleets in the US. Collecting training data for robotics labs at Stanford, Berkeley, and beyond.
key_metrics: 50+ robots deployed across manufacturing, events, retail, hospitality

companies.name: Lindir
companies.description: Data brokerage connecting private data owners to AI buyers. Exclusive licensing, technical delivery, direct access.
products: Financial social data — 18 years, 400M+ human-written data points
Structured sports statistics — 1B+ queries with natural language interface
